name: ASK no-op without handler
description: ASK should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: ASSERT_GOAL no-op without handler
description: ASSERT_GOAL should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: BARRIER no-op without handler
description: BARRIER should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: BOX allocates box with integer value
description: BOX R0, type=0(INT), value=42 → R0 = box_id(0)

name: BROADCAST no-op without handler
description: BROADCAST should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: CALL pushes return address and jumps
description: CALL pushes PC then jumps to target
notes: RET halts because interpreter treats single-element stack as empty

name: CAP_GRANT no-op without handler
description: CAP_GRANT should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: CAP_REQUEST no-op without handler
description: CAP_REQUEST should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: CAP_REQUIRE no-op without handler
description: CAP_REQUIRE should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: CAP_REVOKE no-op without handler
description: CAP_REVOKE should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: CAST i32 to bool (nonzero → 1)
description: CAST R0, R1 with type_tag=2: nonzero → 1

name: CAST i32 to bool (zero → 0)
description: CAST R0, R1 with type_tag=2: zero → 0

name: CHECK_BOUNDS fails when out of range
CHECK_TYPE passes when types match
description: Box with type=0, check type=0 → passes

name: CHECK_TYPE fails when types mismatch
description: Box with type=0, check type=1 → VMTypeError

name: CMP 10 vs 10: zero=True, sign=False
description: CMP sets flags from comparison 10 vs 10

name: CMP 10 vs 20: zero=False, sign=True
description: CMP sets flags from comparison 10 vs 20

name: CMP 20 vs 10: zero=False, sign=False
description: CMP sets flags from comparison 20 vs 10

name: DECLARE_INTENT no-op without handler
description: DECLARE_INTENT should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: DELEGATE no-op without handler
description: DELEGATE should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: DELEGATE_RESULT no-op without handler
description: DELEGATE_RESULT should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: EXPLAIN_FAILURE no-op without handler
description: EXPLAIN_FAILURE should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: FDIV divide by zero raises error
description: Float division by zero should raise error

name: FORMATION_UPDATE no-op without handler
description: FORMATION_UPDATE should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: IADD rd=rs1 overlap safety: R1=R1+R2
description: IADD must read R1 before writing when rd=rs1

name: IDIV divide by zero raises error
description: IDIV by zero should raise VMDivisionByZeroError

name: IMOD divide by zero raises error
description: IMOD by zero should raise VMDivisionByZeroError

name: INEG of zero is zero
description: INEG R0, R1 where R1=0: R0 = 0

name: IREM divide by zero raises error
description: IREM by zero should raise VMDivisionByZeroError

name: JE jumps when values are equal
description: CMP sets zero flag when R0==R1, JE should jump

name: JG jumps when greater (no zero, no sign)
JL jumps when less (sign flag set)
JLE jumps when less-or-equal (zero flag set)
JMP forward skips instruction
description: JMP should skip the MOVI R1,999 and reach HALT
notes: JMP offset is relative to PC after fetch (4 bytes for Format D)

name: JMP backward creates loop
description: JMP backward loops — VM stops via cycle budget

name: JNE jumps when values are not equal
description: CMP clears zero flag when R0!=R1, JNE should jump

name: JNZ jumps when register is non-zero
description: JNZ R0 should jump when R0==42

name: JNZ falls through when register is zero
description: JNZ R0 should not jump when R0==0

name: JZ jumps when register is zero
description: JZ R0 should jump when R0==0, skipping MOVI R1,999

name: JZ falls through when register is non-zero
description: JZ R0 should not jump when R0==42

name: NOP does nothing
description: NOP should execute without modifying any state

name: NOP preserves register state
description: NOP should not alter any register values

name: PUSH/POP preserve value
description: Push R0(99), Pop into R1 → R1 = 99

name: PUSH/POP preserve negative value
description: Push R0(-42), Pop into R1 → R1 = -42

name: PUSH/POP preserve value
description: Push R0(99), Pop into R1 → R1 = 99

name: PUSH/POP preserve negative value
description: Push R0(-42), Pop into R1 → R1 = -42

name: REDUCE no-op without handler
description: REDUCE should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: REPORT_STATUS no-op without handler
description: REPORT_STATUS should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: REQUEST_OVERRIDE no-op without handler
description: REQUEST_OVERRIDE should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: RET from empty stack halts VM
description: RET when stack is empty should halt

name: REVOKE_TRUST no-op without handler
description: REVOKE_TRUST should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: SETCC reads flags from prior operation
description: After INC (result=1, not zero): NE=1, EQ=0

name: SET_PRIORITY no-op without handler
description: SET_PRIORITY should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: SWAP swaps top two stack values
SYNC_CLOCK no-op without handler
description: SYNC_CLOCK should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: TAILCALL jumps without pushing return address
description: TAILCALL should jump without pushing return, so R1 stays 0

name: TELL no-op without handler
description: TELL should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: TEST sets flags from AND without storing
TRUST_CHECK no-op without handler
description: TRUST_CHECK should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: TRUST_QUERY no-op without handler
description: TRUST_QUERY should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: TRUST_UPDATE no-op without handler
description: TRUST_UPDATE should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: UNBOX invalid box id raises error
description: UNBOX with invalid box_id=999 should raise VMTypeError

name: VDIV byte-wise division
description: Byte-wise vector division (no-op with zero-initialized vectors)

name: VDIV by zero raises error
description: VDIV with zero element should raise error

name: VERIFY_OUTCOME no-op without handler
description: VERIFY_OUTCOME should execute as no-op without A2A handler

name: VFMA fused multiply-add
description: VFMA V0, V1, V2: V0 = V0 + V1*V2

name: VLOAD loads 16 bytes from memory
description: Store 17, VLOAD 16 bytes from that address
notes: V0 should contain the stored data (first 4 bytes = 17 in LE)

name: VSTORE stores 16 bytes to memory
description: VSTORE V0 to address in R1

name: WITNESS writes witness mark
description: WITNESS should write a log entry and return count

name: YIELD is a no-op in single-threaded mode
description: YIELD should not crash or modify state
